title: engine mode: make it static
body:
Make the engine mode static and do not make it depend on the runtime OS
or any other runtime data.  The remote support is enabled with a static
build flag, so we can't flip it on-demand.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>
